message:
test: add full lifecycle integration test for transcript logging

Verifies the complete transcript flow including compaction by running a
real session with a small context window, tool calls that produce large
output, and multiple ProcessInput rounds. Asserts header correctness,
monotonic seq numbers, presence of all turn kinds including compaction
turns, correct sequencing of compaction turns, and that original tool
output is preserved (not masked) in the transcript.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
